title: Agent goals — persistent objectives the agent works toward each run
description: Every agent in the framework declares a set of long-running goals (typically 3-7) that its periodic runs incrementally advance. Goals stick around forever; the dashboard renders a per-agent goals tab showing which are accomplished and current progress on the rest. Each run computes new metric values + appends to progress_history.

id.description: Stable kebab-case id (e.g. goal-cap-broken-pages-zero). Never reused.

description.description: Why this goal matters + how reaching it would manifest.

metric.description: How progress is measured. Optional but strongly encouraged.

run_ts.description: The run that produced this measurement.

progress_history.description: Append-only — every run pushes a new entry. Drives the goals chart.

directives.description: What the agent should do each run to advance this goal. Plain-text — read by the agent's LLM at run start to bias its analysis.
